channel.title: Spec-Driven-Development on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Spec-Driven-Development on DevOpsTales

item.title: OpenSpec: The Spec-Driven Development Revolution
item.description: In the age of AI-assisted coding, one problem keeps surfacing: AI doesn’t follow instructions. OpenSpec changes that by introducing spec-driven development—a disciplined workflow where specifications are written before code is generated.

item.title: Kilo Code: Mastering Spec-Driven Development (SDD)
item.description: In our previous post, we explored Codebase Indexing and how Kilo Code builds a semantic map of your repository. Now, it’s time to use that power effectively.

item.title: AI Software Development: Spec-Driven vs. Vibe Coding
item.description: The early days of AI coding were characterized by “vibe coding”—a process where developers would prompt an LLM, hope for a working snippet, and manually fix the hallucinations. While fast for simple tasks, this approach often falls apart in complex, multi-file projects where “context rot” and technical debt accumulate rapidly.
